title: Elves Behavin’ Badly, Elfie’s Illustrated Storybook of Bad Behaviour - 24 Colouring Pages With 2 x 10" Elfie and Elvie Dolls
features: Enchanting dolls and book set for young children.
Elfie’s Illustrated Storybook of Bad Behaviour, with 24 colourful illustrations, is a book made for the imagination of young children.
Dolls allow toddlers to pretend or allows parents to play the scenes of the book to make it even more engaging.
The book measures 10 x 8.5 inches (25.4 x 21.6 cm) and the dolls are approx. 10 inches high (25 cm).
